Connect to Database
Enter your Supabase project details

1. Go to supabase.com and open your project

2. Go to Settings → API

3. Copy your Project URL and anon public key below

Move Data to Cloud
Existing data found on this device

Your inventory, par levels, batch yields, and settings will be migrated to the shared cloud database. This only needs to happen once.

After migration, all data is automatically shared across every device and user in real time.

Account
Signed in
▼

Signed in as

To invite staff: Supabase dashboard → Authentication → Users → Invite User. They receive an email to set their password.

🔐
Admin Users
Who can edit par levels, colors, items, and locations
▼

Admins can modify par levels, app colors, location IDs, and the item list. Non-admins (Staff) can still view everything, edit inventory counts, log transfers, and sync sales.
